ddls:
CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* Print ISSN number */,
  "e_issn" TEXT /* Electronic ISSN number */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the journal is published */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the journal */,
  "journal_type" TEXT /* Type of journal (e.g., peer-reviewed, open access) */,
  "founding_year" TEXT /* Year the journal was founded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the journal (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the journal's scope and focus */,
  "subject_area" TEXT /* Main subject area of the journal (e.g., Medicine, Physics) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the journal entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the journal entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publisher */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the publisher's logo */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the publisher's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the publisher entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the publisher entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal the issue belongs to */,
  "issue_number" TEXT /* Issue number */,
  "volume_number" TEXT /* Volume number */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the cover image of the issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., regular, special) */,
  "editorial_board" TEXT /* List of editorial board members */,
  "preface" TEXT /* Preface or introduction to the issue */,
  "issue_status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., planned, published) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_issues_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the article belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the article */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "article_type" TEXT /* Type of article (e.g., research, review) */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for the article */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Funding sources for the research */,
  "article_status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., draft, published, withdrawn) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the article entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the article entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES journal_issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_authors" (
  "article_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-author link */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "order_number" INTEGER /* Order number of the author in the article */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the author's contribution to the article */,
  "corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Whether the author is the corresponding author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the link entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the link entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_authors_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Numerical rating given by the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the reviewer */,
  "rebuttal" TEXT /* Author's rebuttal to the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the reviewer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_status" TEXT /* Status of the reviewer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reviewer entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reviewer entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, reviewer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article citing another article */,
  "cited_article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cited article */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the cited article is referenced */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., in-text, footnote) */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the citation appears */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the citation entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the citation entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_factors" (
  "impact_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact factor entry */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the impact factor is calculated */,
  "impact_factor_value" REAL /* Impact factor value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the impact factor (e.g., JCR, SCImago) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the journal in the impact factor list */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the impact factor entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the impact factor entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_factors_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication metric */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., citations, downloads) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the metric is calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., Web of Science, Scopus) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the journal in the metric list */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_metrics_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)
